data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"1f67-e7b2","generatedAt":"2026-04-08T04:10:37Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Jira bridge outbound LINK/UNLINK sync for relates_to relationships","description":"Add LINK/UNLINK event processing to bridge-outbound.py. Maps relates_to to Jira Relates link type via name-based lookup. UNLINK uses read-before-delete. Idempotent dedup. Graceful degradation with bridge_alert.","successCriteria":["bridge-outbound.py processes LINK events: maps local relates_to to Jira Relates link type via name-based lookup","UNLINK events remove the corresponding Jira link using a read-before-delete pattern","Round-trip verified: local->Jira and Jira->local","Jira rejection handled gracefully: writes bridge_alert without blocking","LINK event sync is idempotent: pre-create dedup check prevents duplicate Jira links"]},"stories":[{"id":"a367-c19d","title":"Write failing integration tests for Jira bridge outbound LINK/UNLINK sync","description":"TDD RED tests covering LINK processing, UNLINK processing, dedup, graceful degradation","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, test files exist that exercise LINK event processing through process_outbound and all tests fail (RED)","When this story is complete, test files exist that exercise UNLINK event processing through process_outbound and all tests fail (RED)","When this story is complete, test files exist that exercise idempotent dedup behavior and all tests fail (RED)","When this story is complete, test files exist that exercise graceful degradation on Jira API rejection and all tests fail (RED)"],"considerations":["[Testing] All Jira API calls must use mock acli_client","[Testing] Follow existing test patterns in tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"All success criteria (RED tests)"},{"id":"b807-5dec","title":"As a team using DSO with Jira, locally-created relates_to links appear as Relates links in Jira","description":"LINK event processing with name-based link type lookup, pre-create dedup, graceful degradation","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, a LINK event with relation relates_to causes bridge-outbound.py to create a corresponding Relates link in Jira","When this story is complete, the Jira Relates link type ID is resolved by name and cached for the sync run","When this story is complete, duplicate LINK events do not create duplicate Jira links","When this story is complete, Jira rejection writes bridge_alert and continues","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Name-based link type lookup may fail if Relates type not found","[Reliability] Pre-create dedup requires querying existing Jira links","[Testing] All Jira API interactions must be mock-compatible"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["a367-c19d"],"satisfiesCriterion":"bridge-outbound.py processes LINK events"},{"id":"7dca-6661","title":"As a team using DSO with Jira, removing a local relates_to link removes the corresponding Relates link in Jira","description":"UNLINK event processing with read-before-delete pattern matching both endpoints","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, an UNLINK event causes bridge-outbound.py to remove the Jira link via read-before-delete matching both endpoints","When this story is complete, 404 on source issue treated as already gone","When this story is complete, Jira rejection writes bridge_alert and continues","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Read-before-delete must match BOTH gracefully"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["a367-c19d","b807-5dec"],"satisfiesCriterion":"UNLINK events remove the corresponding Jira link using a story is complete, LINK and UNLINK events within a sync batch are processed in timestamp order","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Testing] Round-trip
